Faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Faqs.sub: Here are some of the most common questions we get asked about our services and processes.
Faqs.q1: What services does your agency specialize in?
Faqs.a1: We design, build, and optimize high-performing digital experiences. Our core services include Webflow development, WordPress development, e-commerce solutions, AI integration & automation, custom software development, accessibility testing & compliance, web design, SEO optimization, website maintenance, migration, and copywriting.
Faqs.q2: How does your project process work?
Faqs.a2: Every project begins with discovery—understanding your goals, challenges, and audience. We then move into UX planning, UI design, development, testing, and final deployment. Throughout the process, you receive consistent updates, previews, and opportunities to provide feedback.
Faqs.q3: What is the typical timeline for a project?
Faqs.a3: Timelines vary depending on project scope. A standard website takes 3–6 weeks, an e-commerce build 4–8 weeks, AI integrations 1–4 weeks, and custom software projects can range from 1–3 months. We provide a clear timeline before starting.
Faqs.q4: Do you offer maintenance or ongoing support?
Faqs.a4: Yes. We provide monthly and quarterly maintenance plans that include updates, performance monitoring, security fixes, SEO maintenance, content updates, and ongoing support. Clients who build with us often choose long-term maintenance to keep their website healthy.
Faqs.q5: Can you improve or fix my existing website?
Faqs.a5: Absolutely. Whether your site needs design improvements, performance fixes, bug resolution, migrations, accessibility upgrades, or new features—we can help. We frequently work on inherited or partially completed projects.
Faqs.q6: How do payments and contracts work?
Faqs.a6: We typically take a 40–50% upfront deposit to secure your project, followed by one or two milestone payments. All projects include a clear scope, timeline, and agreement before work begins.
Faqs.q7: Do you work with clients internationally?
Faqs.a7: Yes. We work with clients across the US, Europe, Asia, and the Middle East. All communication is done through email, Notion, Slack, Zoom, or your preferred workflow.

Our team is committed to continuous improvement and we are always looking for ways to enhance our offerings. We value our customers and partners, and we work hard to build long-lasting relationships based on trust and mutual respect.

Hero.title: Making the Web Accessible & Inclusive for Everyone.
Hero.description: We help businesses achieve WCAG compliance, improve user experience for people with disabilities, and mitigate legal risks through expert audits and remediation.

steps.title: Audit & Evaluation
steps.description: Comprehensive automated and manual audits to identify WCAG, ARIA and keyboard-navigation issues across your site.

steps.title: Issue Prioritization & Roadmap
steps.description: We classify findings by severity and impact, produce a remediation roadmap, and estimate effort and business risk for each fix.

steps.title: Remediation & Implementation
steps.description: Our team implements fixes—semantic HTML, ARIA attributes, contrast adjustments, keyboard support and accessible components—while preserving design intent.

steps.title: Verification, Testing & Certification
steps.description: We re-test, validate fixes across devices and screen readers, produce an accessibility report and help you achieve WCAG/Section 508 compliance evidence.

items.title: Automated Site Scans
items.description: Run scheduled automated scans (axe, Lighthouse, WAVE) to continuously surface regressions and new issues.

items.title: Manual Accessibility Audits
items.description: Human-led testing with keyboard-only navigation, screen readers (VoiceOver/NVDA/JAWS), and mobile accessibility checks.

items.title: Contrast & Color Testing
items.description: Contrast analysis and color-blindness simulations with suggested palette adjustments to meet WCAG ratios.

items.title: Keyboard & Focus Management
items.description: Ensure logical tab order, visible focus states, and no keyboard traps for complete keyboard operability.

items.title: ARIA & Semantic Markup Remediation
items.description: Add correct semantic HTML and ARIA roles/labels to ensure assistive technologies interpret content correctly.

items.title: Screen Reader Testing
items.description: VoiceOver / NVDA / JAWS testing and narration tuning so content reads clearly and in the right order for users.

items.title: Accessibility Training & Documentation
items.description: Developer and content-team training, plus an accessibility handbook and remediation guides for long-term compliance.

items.title: Policy & Certification Support
items.description: We prepare reports, remediation logs, and help coordinate third-party certification or legal review for compliance requirements.

Metadata.title: Accessibility Services | TWJ Labs
Metadata.description: Comprehensive accessibility services including automated and manual audits, remediation, testing, and certification support by TWJ Labs.
